author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-bayes audit complete. All 5 sklearn naive_bayes estimators present and now match sklearn 1.9 API. 

Sub-issues closed:
- #253 predict_log_proba + predict_joint_log_proba
- #254 score()
- #255 fit_prior parameter
- #256 force_alpha parameter
- #257 ComplementNB norm parameter  
- #258 CategoricalNB min_categories parameter
- #259 CategoricalNB partial_fit
- #260 proof-of-API integration test

Deferred to existing #71: sample_weight on fit/partial_fit (broader cross-cutting effort).

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- conjugate module (posterior_normal_normal) — no sklearn analogue
- CategoricalNB.partial_fit transparently extends both classes and category lists when new values arrive (sklearn errors)

Verification: 117 tests pass (91 unit + 9 api_proof + 4 oracle + 5 proptest + 1 sklearn_equiv + 7 doctest). Zero regressions.
